name: oh-my-paper-codex
description: Oh My Paper research harness for Codex: research roles, slash commands, shared skills, and a structured memory system for academic projects.

interface.longDescription: Run literature surveys, ideation, experiments, and paper writing inside Codex with structured prompts, role-specific agents, and shared research skills.
defaultPrompt: Set up a research project with Oh My Paper
Run a literature survey for my paper topic
Plan the next experiment for this project
